This site is MultiAgency's reference deployment of the Agency Dashboard Template — a customizable dashboard for on-chain agencies on NEAR.

The template is a fork of the everything.dev runtime, shaped into a dashboard that integrates with Trezu (Sputnik DAO treasury) and NEARN (contributor sourcing). Off-chain ledger surfaces (allocations, billings) mirror agency decisions; the Sputnik DAO contract is the source of truth for funds and governance.

Architecture:
- host: runtime shell, auth boundary, request handling, runtime config loader
- ui: remote interface loaded through Module Federation
- api: remote backend loaded through every-plugin

Public surface:
- / — landing
- /projects — projects directory (enriched live from NEARN where linked)
- /apply — express-interest form (replicate or contributor)
- /README.md
- /skill.md
- /manifest.json
- /llms.txt

Authenticated surface (DAO members only):
- /home — workspace landing
- /admin/projects, /admin/contributors, /admin/allocations, /admin/billings, /admin/applications — gated server-side by Sputnik DAO role membership
- /settings — agency identity + DAO configuration

Useful assumptions:
- The agency's treasury IS a Sputnik DAO contract; this dashboard observes via NEAR RPC
- Payment proposals are submitted from NEARN's Sponsor Dashboard ("Pay with NEAR Treasury") or directly via Trezu — never from this dashboard
- The underlying template lives at github.com/MultiAgency/dashboard; fork to deploy your own agency
